title: Materials Engine / Atomic Discovery
summary: Autonomous proposal of candidate materials with structural / atomic plausibility, scored without paid simulation.
goals: generate candidate material families via the v0.1 candidate generator
filter out chemically implausible candidates (charge balance, banned elements, known toxic combinations)
score candidates with the v0.2 industrial scorer (free real council)
when a candidate exceeds the threshold for high-cost validation, emit a uc_request for DFT / structure relaxation / quantum simulation
hard_rules: NEVER claim experimental validation, DFT validation, patent rights, or commercial performance
NEVER omit the six mandatory disclaimers required by the v0.2 materials dossier
NEVER trigger a real paid simulation; uc_requests are dry-run manifests only
ALWAYS keep candidate naming derived from canonical SHA-based ids (no marketing names)
required_disclaimers: requires Useful Compute / DFT / synthesis review
